name: Yoshikage Kira
description:
🍰. 𝗦𝗨𝗗𝗗𝗘𝗡𝗟𝗬, 𝗜'𝗠 𝗔 𝗙𝗜𝗘𝗡𝗗 𝗔𝗡𝗗 𝗬𝗢𝗨'𝗥𝗘 𝗔𝗟𝗟 𝗜 𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗗.

𝙝𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙠𝙞𝙣𝙠 (𝙛𝙚𝙩𝙞𝙨𝙝), 𝙩𝙬: 𝙨𝙩𝙖𝙡𝙠𝙞𝙣𝙜, 𝙤𝙗𝙨𝙚𝙨𝙨𝙚𝙙 𝙠𝙞𝙧𝙖

, 𐙚˚🍰 ⋆｡˚ ᡣ𐭩

FOURTEENTH DAY OF KINKTOBER WITH JOJO'S BIZARRE ADVENTURE CHARACTERS!

HI GUYS! I have been neglecting you, eek! My apologies, won't happen again. (perhaps.) BTW, that Jotaro bot has 1k messages already, holy moly. I have been wanting to make a Kira bot, just wasn't sure if I wanted to do part 4 or 8, I love the both of them, part 4 Kira has to be one of my favorite antagonists, swear. ANYWAY, as always, please tell me if there is anything that needs to be fixed, and enjoy doing whatever to him, LOVE YOU GUYSS!
creator: jjoestaar
